name: King's Flair International (Holdings) Limited
summary: King's Flair International (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, provides kitchenware and household products in the United States, Europe, Asia, Canada, and internationally. Its products include kitchen tools and gadgets, drinkware, bakeware, and accessories, as well as food preparation products. The company is also involved in the retail, wholesale, distribution, and trading of kitchenware products; manufacturing and trading of nano-tech related materials and products; and trading of raw materials, including silicone. King's Flair International (Holdings) Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
